subcodes.title: Words spoken in Sep. 1911 in London
subcodes.first_line: It depends on how intensely you, each and every one of you, serve day and night. Ye are all torches that I have lighted with mine own hands.
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
